source_pr.title: executor: fix insert on duplicate update
source_pr.body:
Do insert when check duplicate and update. It is not the same logic as `insert ignore`, because `insert ignore` only skip the duplicate rows, without doing anything.
PTAL @coocood

symptoms: testSQL = `select * from test order by i;` (executor/write_test.go)
failure_signature: testSQL = `select * from test order by i;` (executor/write_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: testSQL = `select * from test order by i;` (executor/write_test.go)
